name: Composite-Bench NPP ladder
description: Composite-Bench's sixth slice, scored separately by preregistration: number partitioning generated at the phase transition, certified unsolvable within the compute budget (exact success 0/160 across all eight models, matching the preregistered prediction). The ladder score grades the best answer a model holds onto, on a log scale from 0 (no better than an arbitrary split) to 1 (perfect partition, never achieved), with standard algorithms of increasing quality at known rungs — a measure of anytime search discipline when the problem cannot be finished.
